specializations: Signal peptides and matrikines for collagen stimulation
Clinically validated biotech skin care actives
product_highlights: Matrixyl® 3000 — palmitoyl tripeptide-1 and palmitoyl tetrapeptide-7 complex clinically proven to halve deep wrinkles
Leuphasyl® — pentapeptide-18 mimicking enkephalin for expression wrinkle relaxation
Biopeptide CL™ — palmitoyl oligopeptide stimulating collagen I, III and fibronectin biosynthesis
Renovage™ — teprenone-based biotech active addressing all hallmarks of skin cellular ageing
notes: Sederma, the cosmetic actives division of Croda International based in Croissy-sur-Seine, France, is the originator of the globally iconic Matrixyl® peptide franchise — the most widely referenced peptide brand in prestige anti-ageing formulation. Matrixyl® 3000, combining palmitoyl tripeptide-1 and palmitoyl tetrapeptide-7, is backed by clinical evidence demonstrating a 45% reduction in deep wrinkles, making it the benchmark biotech signal peptide in the industry. Sederma's extensive biotech portfolio spans fermentation-derived actives, synthetic biomimetic peptides, and novel anti-ageing molecules, all supported by comprehensive clinical and mechanistic data for regulatory and marketing use.
